description_long: This object consists of a small cluster of vibrant green leaves, likely from a mint plant, emerging from a compact, round pot. The leaves are textured with prominent veins and serrated edges, giving them a fresh and lively appearance. The pot is circular, shallow, and appears to be made of a light-colored material, possibly plastic or ceramic. Attached to the pot is a round label with Cyrillic writing, suggesting it is a commercial or decorative potted plant. The overall size is small, suitable for placement on a tabletop or windowsill. The plant looks healthy, with no visible signs of damage or discoloration.
description: A small potted mint plant with lush green, veined leaves and a round, light-colored pot featuring a visible label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cluster of green mint leaves and the top of the round pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the leaves and the attached round label with Cyrillic text.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the leaves and the circular shape of the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the pot and the label, with leaves partially obscuring the pot.
